---
title: "Merge all serology files"
format: html
---

## Constant

Path to data:

```{r}
path2data <- paste0("C:/Users/ongph/github/data")
```

Files names:

```{r}
sero_dir <- "sero/cleaned"
sero_files <- list.files(
    path = file.path(path2data, sero_dir), 
    pattern = "\\.rds$", 
    full.names = TRUE
  )
```

## Packages

Required packages:

```{r}
# Edit this only
required <- c("tidyverse", "janitor")
```

Installing those that are not installed yet:

```{r}
to_install <- required[! required %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"]]
if (length(to_install)) install.packages(to_install)
```

Loading the packages for interactive use:

```{r}
invisible(sapply(required, library, character.only = TRUE))
```

## Functions

## Data

Read all .rds files in the data folder

```{r}
list_df <- sero_files |> 
  map(readRDS) |> 
  list_rbind()
```

## Merge files

```{r}
df <- list_df[[1]]
df2 <- list_df[[2]]
```
